fields.explainEn: Whether the tablespace can be extended.

fields.explainZh: Oracle应用表空间的可扩展大小。
fields.explainEn: Size by which the Oracle application tablespace can be extended.
Logical reads of the SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句被解析和执行的CPU时间。
fields.explainEn: CPU time for which the SQL statement is parsed and executed.
Physical reads of the SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句被解析和执行的共用时间。
fields.explainEn: Total duration for which the SQL statement is parsed and executed.

fields.explainZh: 读取数据文件的平均时间。
fields.explainEn: Average time for reading a data file.

fields.explainZh: 写入数据文件的平均时间。
fields.explainEn: Average time for writing a data file.

fields.explainZh: Oracle应用数据文件的大小（字节为单位）。
fields.explainEn: Size of the Oracle application data file in bytes.

fields.explainZh: 数据文件的名称和位置。
fields.explainEn: Name and location of the data file.

fields.explainZh: 从数据库文件读取的次数。
如果数据文件是系统表空间的一部分，则其状态为 SYSTEM。如果非系统表空间的数据文件在线，则其状态为ONLINE。如果非系统表空间的数据文件离线，则其状态可能为OFFLINE或RECOVER。
fields.explainEn: If the data file is not part of the system tablespace and is offline, the state is OFFLINE or RECOVER.

fields.explainZh: 写入数据库文件的次数。
用户对该项作业的名称（或服务器生成的默认名称）。
fields.explainEn: User-supplied name for the job (or the default name generated by the server).

fields.explainZh: 启动该作业的用户名称。

fields.explainEn: Logical reads of the SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句被解析和执行的CPU时间。
fields.explainEn: CPU time for which the SQL statement is parsed and executed.
Physical reads of the SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句被解析和执行的共用时间。
fields.explainEn: Total duration for which the SQL statement is parsed and executed.

fields.explainZh: 应用服务器所在域名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the domain where the application server resides.
Time when the database was created.

fields.explainZh: 是否将事务写入日志，包括ARCHIVELOG和NOARCHIVELOG两种模式。
数据库实例的打开模式，包括只读和读写两种模式。
fields.explainEn: Open mode information, READ and WRITEREAD ONLY.
Time when the Oracle PDB was started.
Version of the Oracle PDB application.
Block size of the current PDB.

fields.explainZh: 数据打开方式,有以下值（MOUNTED、READ WRITE、READ ONLY、MIGRATE）。
fields.explainEn: Data opening mode. Options include MOUNTED, READ WRITE, READ ONLY, and MIGRATE.

fields.explainZh: 数据库上次打开的日期和时间。
fields.explainEn: Date and time when the database was opened last time.

fields.explainZh: 显示PDB是启用还是禁用恢复,有以下值（ENABLED、DISABLED）。
fields.explainEn: Whether the PDB recovery is enabled or disabled. Options include ENABLED and DISABLED.

fields.explainZh: 指示是否只有拥有RESTRICTED SESSION权限的用户才能连接到PDB,有以下值（YES、NO、NULL）。
fields.explainEn: Whether only users with the RESTRICTED SESSION permissions can connect to the PDB. Options include YES, NO, and NULL.

fields.explainZh: 显示PDB使用的磁盘空间（以字节为单位），包括数据和临时文件。
fields.explainEn: Disk size used by the PDB in bytes, including data and temporary files.
Hit ratio of the program global area (PGA).

fields.explainZh: PGA已使用缓存占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the used size to the total size for the PGA.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的后台进程数量。
数据库当前的进程数量。
数据库的最大进程数量。
数据库的当前会话数量。
数据库的最大会话数量。
数据库的活跃会话数量。
如果会话当前正在等待，则会话正在等待的资源或事件。如果会话未处于等待状态，则为会话最近等待的资源或事件。
fields.explainEn: If the session is currently waiting, then the resource or event for which the session is waiting.If the session is not in a wait, then the resource or event for which the session most recently waited.

fields.explainZh: 第一等待事件参数（十进制）。
第二等待事件参数（十进制）。
第三等待事件参数（十进制）。
包含在row_WAIT_row#中指定的行的表的对象ID。
fields.explainEn: Object ID for the table containing the row specified in ROW_WAIT_ROW#.

fields.explainZh: 如果会话当前正在等待，则该值是当前等待的时间量。如果会话未处于等待状态，则该值是上次等待开始以来的时间量。
fields.explainEn: If the session is currently waiting, then the value is the amount of time waited for the current wait. If the session is not in a wait, then the value is the amount of time since the start of the last wait.

fields.explainZh: 用于唯一标识会话的对象。
fields.explainEn: Used to uniquely identify a session objects.

fields.explainZh: 当前正在执行的SQL语句的SQL标识符。
fields.explainEn: SQL identifier of the SQL statement that is currently being executed.
Name of the class of the wait event.

fields.explainZh: 不需要进行磁盘访问的情况下，在内存中找到常用数据块的频率。
fields.explainEn: Frequency of finding commonly used data blocks in memory without disk access.

fields.explainZh: 不需要进行磁盘访问的情况下，在内存中找到数据字典的频率。
fields.explainEn: Frequency of finding data dictionary in memory without disk access.

fields.explainZh: 库缓存保存所有共享的SQL和PL/SQL块以及其分析树。在大量用户进入并且交换数据的OLTP环境中，很可能存在不同查询的重叠分析和执行。库中的这种重叠称为缓存命中，错过和命中的比率称为库缓存命中率。
fields.explainEn: The library stores all shared SQL and PL/SQL blocks and their parse trees. In an OLTP environment with a large number of users accessing and exchanging data, analyses and executions of different queries might overlap. An overlap in the library is called a hit. The ratio of misses to hits is called the library hit rate.
Name of the schema parsing the SQL.
Total execution time of the current SQL.

fields.explainZh: SQL执行的CPU耗时占执行时间的比率。由于CPU耗时统计的是多个CPU的花费时间总和可能导致CPU耗时大于执行时间，即该指标可能大于100%。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the CPU time to the execution time for the SQL statement in percentage. The CPU time is the total time used by multiple CPUs (if any), which might be greater than the execution time. In this case, the value for this index is greater than 100%.

fields.explainZh: SQL执行的用户IO耗时占执行时间的比率。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of user IO time consumed by SQL execution to execution time.

fields.nameZh: 执行时间/数据库总时间
fields.explainZh: SQL累积执行时间占数据库总时间的比率。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of SQL cumulative execution time to total database time.

fields.explainZh: 自授予当前模式以来的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time since current mode was granted.
First thousand characters of the SQL text.
Logical reads of the SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句被解析和执行的CPU时间。
fields.explainEn: CPU time for which the SQL statement is parsed and executed.
Physical reads of the SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句被解析和执行的共用时间。
fields.explainEn: Total duration for which the SQL statement is parsed and executed.
Number of blocks allocated in the tablespace.
Number of data files in the tablespace.
Number of free blocks in the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 可以使用的表空间大小。
扩展至最大可扩展容量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum capacity that can be extended to.

fields.explainZh: 扩展至最大可扩展容量后可以使用的表空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Free size of the tablespace after the capacity is extended to the maximum capacity.

fields.explainZh: 从数据库文件读取的次数。
每次读表空间所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time for reading the tablespace each time.

fields.explainZh: 表空间的状态，可能为ONLINE、OFFLINE或INVALID。
fields.explainEn: State of the tablespace. Options include ONLINE, OFFLINE, and INVALID.

fields.explainZh: 已经使用的表空间大小。
每次写表空间所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time for each write into the tablespace.
Maximum capacity to which the temporary tablespace can be extended.
Total number of blocks in the temporary tablespace.
Number of used blocks in the temporary tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 临时表空间已使用字节数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of used bytes in the temporary tablespace.
Account state of the Oracle user.
Time when the Oracle user was created.
Default tablespace of the Oracle user.
Expiry date of the Oracle user.

fields.explainZh: Oracle用户距离当前时间过期的天数。
fields.explainEn: Remaining lifetime (in days) of the Oracle user.
Time when the Oracle user was locked.
Temporary tablespace of the Oracle user.
Whether the Oracle user is a DBA user.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
